title: Foxglove Comics Emoji
description: Unofficial Emoji Mod that provides support for Foxglove Comics' Discord emoji.
body:
## Description
Unofficial Emoji Mod that provides support for Foxglove Comics' Discord emoji. 

## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## Features List
- Displays Discord emoji in game chat
- Supports all Foxglove Comics emoji
  - as of the release date of the mod jar file
- Supports all default Discord emoji
  - these can be turned off in the config file
- Emoji suggestions / auto complete while you type

## How To Use
The functionality is the same as from Discord.

1. Open In-Game chat
2. Type in `:`
3. Type emoji name (for example `foxglovehype`)
4. You can press TAB to get suggestions (example: `:foxglove` and pressing TAB will show every foxglove emoji)
4. End with `:` (example: `:foxglovehype:`)
5. Press enter

## Missing
- Only the Foxglove Comics' Discord chat bridge (#minecraft) can render the emoji in Discord. Other servers' chat bridges can not do so. This is a custom feature provided by the Foxglove Comics Minecraft server owner, Gunny. Anyone can send emoji to the Discord chat from Minecraft's chat, with or without this mod.
- Animated emoji are not animated. Instead, the first frame is shown.
- The emoji suggestor in chat is not as robust as Discord's. You must type every letter from the start of the emoji name. eg: `hype` does not suggest `foxglovehype`.


## Known issues
If any of these issues happen to you, please contact me directly on Discord.

- Foxglove Comics emoji not showing in game chat, or displaying as unicode characters.
  - Please make sure the vanilla resource pack is first in your resource pack list. Either in the game's menu or by editing your options.txt file directly.
- Hovering over emoji is offset or doesn't appear while having Player Heads mod installed.

## Disclaimer
This mod is a fan project for the [Foxglove Comics](<https://www.foxglovecomics.com/>) Minecraft server, developed and provided with permission from Foxglove Comics. It is not maintained, developed, nor funded by Foxglove Comics staff. If you require support or wish to report a bug, contact Gandeldalf (mod author), not Foxglove Comics staff.
